title: Spicy American Fudge Cookie Bars
description: A twist on traditional cookie bars with the addition of spicy flavor.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C). Line an 8-inch square baking dish with parchment paper.
Melt the fudge and butter in a microwave-safe bowl in 30-second increments, stirring between each interval, until smooth.
Whisk together the sugar, eggs, and vanilla extract in a large bowl.
Add the cookie and melted fudge mixture to the sugar mixture. Stir until just combined.
Stir in the spicy American chocolate chips.
Press the mixture into the prepared baking dish.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
Let cool completely in the pan before cutting into bars.
